  • Constructor Details

    • ColumnTransformation

      public ColumnTransformation(int columnIndex, MemorizedResultSetTransformer.AggregateFunction aggregateFunction)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      columnIndex - the 1-based column index in the source result set
      aggregateFunction - the aggregate function to apply, or null to use the column as a grouping key
